data.title: Aethlon Medical announces $3.3 million private placement and warrant inducement.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, in San Diego, Aethlon Medical, Inc. (Nasdaq: AEMD), a company specializing in medical therapeutics for cancer and infectious diseases, disclosed entering into a securities purchase agreement. The company is focused on developing innovative products for these critical areas.

data.title: Jed Foundation gets $40M donation from MacKenzie Scott to support mental health in teens and young adults.
data.description: The Jed Foundation (JED) has received an additional unrestricted donation, marking the second such gift since 2022. This latest contribution aims to further JED's mission in aiding emotional well-being and preventing suicide among teenagers and young adults. The donation was made in New York on December 5, 2025. JED is a renowned nonprofit organization dedicated to safeguarding emotional health and reducing suicide rates among youths.
ECB's Villeroy: Currently good position of ECB policy does not mean a comfortable position nor a fixed one.

data.title: Unit Corp (OTCQX: UNTC) declares $1.25/share dividend for Q4 2025, payable Dec 26 to shareholders as of Dec 16.
data.description: Unit Corporation (OTCQX: UNTC) based in Tulsa, Oklahoma, declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.25 per common stock share for Q4 2025. Shareholders as of December 16, 2025, will receive the dividend on December 26, 2025. The funding for the dividend will come from the Company's cash reserves. Unit Corporation is a publicly traded energy firm involved in oil and natural gas operations.

data.title: Beeple's art exhibit at Art Basel features robot dogs resembling Musk, Zuckerberg, Warhol who create NFTs through algorithmic control.
data.description: At Art Basel, an installation is presented as a critique of algorithmic control by combining machine perception with on-chain "memories."

data.title: Plume launches RWA Nest Vaults on Solana with assets from various issuers, establishing a new yield economy.
data.description: Plume, a top-tier RWA blockchain enabling real-world yield, has introduced new vaults on Solana containing assets from major players like WisdomTree, Hamilton Lane, BlackOpal, Securitize, and SuperState. These nest vaults signify the start of a fresh yield economy for Solana. The announcement was made in New York on December 5, 2025.

data.title: Thailand has 39 existing data centers, Bangkok, Rayong, and Chon Buri account for over 40% of upcoming capacity. Top operators: SUPERNAP, True IDC, ST Telemedia.
data.description: A new report on Thailand's data center industry reveals that the country currently houses approximately 39 operational data centers. Major cities such as Bangkok and Chon Buri are key players in this sector. Moreover, upcoming data centers are set to increase the country's capacity significantly, with locations like Rayong, Chon Buri, and Bangkok contributing to over 40% of the upcoming data center power. Key players in the market include SUPERNAP Thailand, True IDC, and ST Telemedia Global Data Centres.

data.title: XRP price nears $2, market cap $124.8 billion with 7-day trend -5.9%. Social sentiment negative but on-chain data positive.
data.description: XRP's (CRYPTO: XRP ) sentiment among social media has turned significantly negative, contrasting with positive indicators from on-chain and ETF data. Currently, XRP is priced at $2.06 with a market cap of $124.8 billion, showing a 7-day decrease of -5.9%. In comparison, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) is trading at $90,734 with a market cap of $1.82 trillion, down by -0.3% over the same period, while Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) is priced at $3,110 with a market cap of $377.7 billion, experiencing a 7-day increase of +3%. Trader insights from Cryptoinsightuk emphasize that XRP's long-term structure remains bullish, with the yearly range lows now acting as strong support levels instead of the prior seven-year resistance. Additionally, XRP has formed a higher low within this range on shorter time frames. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Teton releases 2025 holiday gift guide with products for all outdoor enthusiasts, affordable & reliable. #outdoorgifts
data.description: Teton, a well-known outdoor brand based in Salt Lake City, revealed a range of gift ideas on Dec. 5, 2025. These products cater to both outdoor experts and beginners, offering comfort, reliability, and convenience. The brand is recognized for its affordable yet high-quality items.

data.title: Kulicke & Soffa declares quarterly dividend of $0.205 per share of common stock, payable to shareholders.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, Kulicke and Soffa Industries, Inc. (NASDAQ: KLIC) disclosed the approval from its Board of Directors for a quarterly dividend of $0.205 per common stock share. This dividend will be distributed to shareholders on...

data.title: Academy Sports & Outdoors declares $0.13 quarterly cash dividend on December 4, 2025, post-fiscal quarter ended November 1.
data.description: On December 4, 2025, Academy Sports and Outdoors, Inc. declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.13 per share for the fiscal quarter that ended on November 1, 2025. The company, listed as "Academy" on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol ASO, made this announcement from Katy, Texas.

data.title: USMNT's Gio Reyna and Joe Scally mentor ISA players at Borussia Mönchengladbach, promoting U.S. pathway to Bundesliga.
data.description: Elite young American soccer players are making waves in Germany as part of the U.S. Pathway to Bundesliga program. Promising talents like Gio Reyna and Joe Scally are showcasing their skills on Instagram Reel, offering viewers a glimpse into their journey. Recently, players from the International Soccer Academy (ISA) in North America had the opportunity to connect with members of the U.S. Men's National Team (USMNT) and Borussia Dortmund. This initiative signifies a crucial stepping stone for American youth athletes aiming to compete at a high level in Europe.

data.title: Vindral, a Swedish live streaming platform, partners with Akamai for low latency streaming. Silver award winner in SportsPro. Serving clients for 10+ years in sports, auctions, iGaming, live events.
data.description: In UMEÅ, Sweden on December 5, 2025, the Swedish live streaming service Vindral has successfully provided ultra-low latency streaming to clients in sports, auctions, iGaming, and live events for over a decade. The platform's outstanding performance was recognized with a Silver award in the renowned SportsPro Media Awards.

data.title: CFTC greenlights US spot crypto trading on all registered exchanges, boosting institutional access.
data.description: The approval has been granted for spot crypto trading to commence with any exchange that is CFTC-registered, marking a significant step towards increased institutional adoption in the sector. This milestone eliminates a key obstacle and opens up opportunities for more widespread participation.

data.title: NexPoint Real Estate Finance, Inc. (NYSE: NREF) announces $0.53125 dividend/share for 8.50% Series A Preferred Stock. Payable on Jan 26, 2026.
data.description: In Dallas on December 5, 2025, NexPoint Real Estate Finance, Inc. (NYSE: NREF) disclosed a dividend declaration for its 8.50% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock (NYSE: NREF PRA), averaging $0.53125 per share. This dividend is scheduled for disbursement on January 26, 2026, to...
